user_text: According to me hands are better than Lex because they help you modulate stuff and you can hold stuff and it's better overall because you can read stuff but legs can't help as you can as you can only walk with the murder with them and perform no other major task my hands will let you do anything like operate laptops and without legs you can use wheelchairs but without hands you can do nothing
ai_text:
Alright, cool argument, but I’m gonna push back hard here. First off, you said "without legs you can use a wheelchair," but *how do you operate a wheelchair without hands*? If you’ve got no hands, you’re stuck—literally. Wheelchairs require grip, steering, pushing wheels. So your whole "wheelchair saves you" point collapses if we’re comparing *total loss* of either. But here’s the kicker: **legs keep you alive**. Without leg movement, blood pools, clots form, muscles atrophy, and organs fail. You can’t just "use tech" to fix that—your body *needs* legs for circulation. Hands don’t do that.  

Also,
